decisions.decision: MVP scope defined as: CBS with multi-currency, SEPA payments, Mastercard virtual+physical cards, Sumsub KYC/AML, basic Fuse.io crypto (buy/sell/send/receive), native mobile apps (iOS+Android)
decisions.rationale: Covers all client requirements at MVP level; advanced features (business accounts, DeFi yield, Open Banking) deferred to Phase 2

decisions.decision: Flutter recommended as mobile framework over separate native (Swift+Kotlin)
decisions.rationale: Fuse.io provides Flutter SDK; single codebase reduces development time by ~40%; Flutter maturity is sufficient for banking apps

decisions.decision: TeslaPay primary differentiator: regulated EU banking + self-custodial Web3 wallet with DeFi yield
decisions.rationale: No competitor occupies this niche; Revolut/N26 lack DeFi; Crypto.com lacks banking depth
